original_image_tags: Aged, off-white paper document page, showing reverse side. The top edge is irregular with two small black punch-hole remnants. Faint, mirrored text from the front of the page is visible through the thin paper. Several blue and black ink routing stamps are oriented at various angles, primarily in the lower half.

elements.description: Multiple overlapping blue ink stamps from the U.S. Department of Justice, F.B.I., and other agencies, indicating receipt dates and routing between March and April 1949. One stamp notes 'INTERNAL SECURITY'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific agency names and dates from stamps that Description A does not identify, indicating hallucination of detailed text content not present in the visual record.
